title: plumeria rubra var. acuminata
intro: Plumeria rubra var. acuminata, also known as the fragrant frangipani, is a variety of the plumeria plant, characterized by its fragrant flowers and slender leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The health benefits of plumeria rubra var. acuminata include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
